visualization.title: Percentage of Classrooms with Projectors by Building

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  building AS building,
  100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_projector THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS projector_percentage,
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_projector THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS projector_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM public.classrooms
GROUP BY building
ORDER BY building ASC;

issues: Y-axis and tooltip show numeric percentage values but do not include a percent symbol; this may be ambiguous to end users (consider formatting with a %).
Bars are ordered by building name (alphabetical); if you intended to highlight highest/lowest percentages, sort by projector_percentage instead of building.
Using type 'nominal' for building is fine, but if buildings have a natural order (e.g., floors or blocks) consider an ordinal or explicit sort to reflect that order.

visualization.title: Percentage of Classrooms with Projectors by Building

result.sql:
SELECT
  building AS building,
  100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_projector THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS projector_percentage,
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_projector THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS projector_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM public.classrooms
GROUP BY building
ORDER BY building ASC;

issues: Y-axis and tooltip show numeric percentage values but do not include a percent symbol; this may be ambiguous to end users (consider formatting with a %).
Bars are ordered by building name (alphabetical); if you intended to highlight highest/lowest percentages, sort by projector_percentage instead of building.
Using type 'nominal' for building is fine, but if buildings have a natural order (e.g., floors or blocks) consider an ordinal or explicit sort to reflect that order.
